auth.name: Name
auth.demoCaption: Signs you in as the shared demo account. Data resets daily.

auth.inviteComingSoon: Invite acceptance is coming soon. The backend implementation for validating invitation tokens is in progress.
auth.inviteNoToken: No invitation token found in the URL. Please use the link from your invitation email.

landing.heroTagline: Take control of your finances. Track expenses, manage budgets, and achieve your financial goals.
landing.trackExpensesDesc: Monitor your spending across multiple accounts and categories
landing.budgetDesc: Set budgets and get insights into your spending habits
landing.reportsDesc: Generate detailed reports to understand your financial health

dashboard.noTransactionData: No transaction data for this period

accounts.deleteAccountConfirmNoTransactions: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.

accounts.deleteAccountConfirmWithTransactions_oth: This account has {{count}} transaction(s). Deleting this account may affect those transactions. Are you sure you want to continue? This action cannot be undone.
accounts.deleteAccountConfirmGlobalWithTransactio: This account has {{count}} transaction(s). Deleting this account will set their account_id to NULL, preserving transaction history. Are you sure you want to continue? This action cannot be undone.
This account has {{count}} transaction(s). Deleting this account will set their account_id to NULL, preserving transaction history. Are you sure you want to continue? This action cannot be undone.

accounts.showingTransactionsAllFamilies: Showing all transactions for this account across all families

accounts.alreadySharedWithAllFamilies: This account is already shared with all your families
accounts.familyRequired: Please select a family to share with

budgets.viewerNotice: You have viewer access. Only family owners can create or modify budgets.

budgets.formFieldCategoriesHelper: Leave empty to track all tenant spending

categories.transactionsWarning_one: This category is used by {{count}} transaction.
categories.transactionsWarning_other: This category is used by {{count}} transactions.
categories.reassignRequired: To delete this category, you must first reassign all transactions to another category. Select a replacement category below.
categories.noOtherCategoriesAvailable: No other {{kind}} categories available. You must create another {{kind}} category before deleting this one.
categories.safeToDelete: This category is not used by any transactions and can be safely deleted.
categories.hasChildrenWarning: This category has subcategories. You must delete all child categories first before deleting this parent category.
categories.addFirstCategoryPrompt: Add your first category to start organizing transactions

settings.categoriesSectionDescription: Organize your transactions with custom categories. Create parent categories and subcategories to build a hierarchy that works for your family.
settings.membersSectionDescription: Manage who has access to this family's financial data.

family.subtitle: Select a family to access its financial data
family.noFamiliesYet: You don't belong to any families yet.
family.familyNameHelper: Choose a name for your family or household
family.familyNameMinLength: Family name must be at least 2 characters
family.emailHelper: Enter the email address of the person to invite
family.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
family.roleOwnerOption: Owner - full control including member management
family.roleMemberOption: Member - can create and edit transactions
family.invitePrompt: Invite family members to start collaborating on finances
family.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}} from the family? They will lose access to all family data.
family.removeMemberConfirmFallback: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the family? They will lose access to all family data.
family.leaveDialogMessage: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? You will lose access to all family data including transactions, accounts, and categories.
family.deletePermanentWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone!
family.deleteListMembers: All family members and their access

imports.uploadIntro: Select a CSV file exported from your bank or financial tool. The first row must contain column names. Maximum file size: 5 MB.
imports.uploadDropzonePrompt: Click to browse or drag a CSV file here
imports.mapColumnsIntro: Tell us which CSV column maps to each transaction field. Auto-proposals are based on column name patterns — adjust any that look wrong.
imports.mapColumnsDateHelper: Select the column that contains the transaction date
imports.mapColumnsAmountHelper: Select the column that contains the monetary amount
imports.mapColumnsAccountHelper: Select the account these transactions belong to
imports.mapColumnsTypeHelper: If omitted, the type is inferred from the amount sign (negative = expense, positive = income)
imports.mapColumnsPositiveAreExpensesTooltip: Controls how the sign of the amount is classified. When on, positive amounts are expenses and negative amounts are income — the convention for credit-card statements. When off, negative = expense and positive = income (bank/debit statements). Only applies when no Type column is mapped.
imports.mapColumnsHeaderRowHelper: 0 = first row is the header. Increase if your CSV has metadata rows above the headers.
imports.mapColumnsAnalyzeErrorFallback: Analysis failed. Check your column mapping and try again.
imports.reviewInfoAlert: Uncheck a row to skip it. Duplicate rows (matching an existing transaction by date and amount) are pre-skipped — uncheck to include anyway. Rows with a Possible duplicate status may duplicate a transaction logged 1–2 days earlier; hover the status to see the match and uncheck the row if it is a duplicate.
imports.reviewInfoAlertMain: Uncheck a row to skip it. Duplicate rows (matching an existing transaction by date and amount) are pre-skipped — uncheck to include anyway. Rows with a
imports.reviewInfoAlertEnd: status may duplicate a transaction logged 1–2 days earlier; hover the status to see the match and uncheck the row if it is a duplicate.
imports.reviewDuplicateTooltip: A transaction with the same date and amount already exists in this account
imports.reviewPossibleDuplicateTooltipTitle: Possible duplicate — a similar transaction was already logged 1–2 days earlier:
imports.reviewPossibleDuplicateUncheck: Uncheck this row to exclude it.
imports.importWaitMessage: This may take a few seconds. Do not close this tab.
imports.importFailedFallback: The import failed. Please check your CSV and try again.
imports.historyPageDescription: Every CSV import dispatched from this family appears here with its current status. Running imports refresh automatically.
imports.historyEmptyBody: Once you import a CSV it will appear here with its status.

transactions.deleteTransactionsMessage_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.deleteTransactionsMessage_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} transactions? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.transactionNotFoundMessage: Transaction not found. It may have been deleted or you may not have permission to view it.
transactions.deleteTransactionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.addPageHelper: All fields marked with * are required. The transaction will be saved to your current family's records.
